title: Custom Anchors
description: Allows you to change the color of your anchors and transparency and color + put an endgateway effect and more
body:
**Custom Anchors**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Custom anchors mod is a mod that allows you to customize your anchors to your liking, it comes with a anchor color changer and transparency slider with other things like an end gateway effect, enchanted anchors with many different glint types to choose from, currently the mod works vulkan on sodium but only for 1.21.11, On the versions below sodium and vanilla should work just fine too. If you would like to help support the development of this mod - https://ko-fi.com/cutebow **Join my discord for updates.** ---
**Showcase** _More Anchor Enchant Glints In My Discord_ ![eeeee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ddysomWi/images/87f3d7de55c71553786df29ea626a1b56f51c53f.png)
--- Slightly outdated settings as there is a lot more. Settings: - transparency slider tint selector (color) Preview charges (the amount of charges the preview anchor has) Motion smoothing (smooths the anchor when rotation Edit preview (allows you to edit the preview scale location and background + alpha) - gateway toggle - block scale for gateway - glint toggle - glint type - block scale (for glint) - transparency toggle (for glint) - transparency slider (for glint) - tint selector (for glint) - and many more. **Requires YACL and Mod Menu** **join my Discord!** [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
